notes: EX-series booster = 9 cards (Bulbapedia, confirmed). Modeled slots: 4 common, 3 uncommon, 1 reverse-holo (Common/Uncommon of an existing card), 1 rare-or-better. Reverse-holo split common/uncommon weighted by set bucket counts (31 common, 30 uncommon -> 0.51/0.49). Rare slot: per Flipside Gaming, EX Holon Phantoms Pokemon-ex pull rate is 1:36 packs (~1 ex per booster box -> 0.028/pack); Gold Star ~1:72 packs (~1 per 2 boxes -> 0.014/pack); 1 secret rare in the set modeled conservatively at ~0.010/pack (era secret-rare tail ranges ~1:36 to 1:72, single-card slot kept modest). Remaining 0.948 of the rare slot split between non-holo rare (20 cards) and rare-holo (23 cards) weighted by bucket counts -> rare 0.441, rare-holo 0.507. Distribution sums to exactly 1.0. confidence=low: no per-set published study; rates are era-average (ex 1:36 is HP-specific from Flipside; gold-star/secret are era baselines). Booster box = 36 packs, NO ETB (ex era) -> etbPacks null, displayPacks=36 (box pack count). PokeBeach pull-rate thread cited as community corroboration (page returned 403 on fetch but is the canonical English box-opening dataset; era figures corroborated by Flipside Gaming which summarizes it).
